channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: CD account moves savers should consider as inflation rises again
item.description: Inflation has climbed to its highest level since 2023. Here are three CD account strategies savers can adopt in response.

item.title: Bill Gates tells House panel his meetings with Epstein were a 'grave error in judgment'
item.description: Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates is being questioned by the House Oversight Committee about his ties to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

item.title: Search underway for girl swept out to sea in Southern California
item.description: Authorities are searching for a girl who was swept away in the ocean off Southern California, officials reported.

item.title: Trump's arch construction to run 20 hours a day for 2 to 3 years, documents show
item.description: To complete Trump's 'Triumphal Arch' before he leaves office, construction would run 20 hours a day for two to three years, according to documents.
